title: Kitty the Cat Superhero and the Gopher Tunnel Visit
summary: Kitty, a human girl dressed in a cat costume, acts as a superhero who protects people and talks to animals. During a visit to the underground tunnels with her mole friend Uncle Grisco, she meets a young gopher named Goober. While her cat Pumpkin is initially terrified of the large gopher, Kitty and Goober bond over their differences and her recent heroic feat of returning a stolen golden tiger statue to a museum. The encounter ends with plans for future visits and breakfast at a diner.

highlightQuote.text: I'm a person superhero because I have my cat costume on.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's tell the mole story that we were working on and we got to the cave part.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, could you... could you tell the story so far? What's happened so far in the story?
Kitty already dropped me to the gopher's mouth with tunnel. That's where we left off.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, and what was Kitty looking for?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: The gophers.
Oh, and why was she looking for the gophers?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Because she wants to meet a gopher.
Kitty, do you really want to meet a gopher?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Kitty said, 'Well, yes, I've never met a... a gopher actually, and I feel like it's an important part of my job at being a cat superhero, um, to meet gophers because I'm curious about them and I want to learn about them.'
Yeah, yeah, but they're really big and they have sharp teeth and their teeth are really big, Kitty.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, but do they bite people?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I don't think so.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Uncle Grisco said, 'No, uh, they... they do not bite people. They just... they just like to nibble on vegetables and stuff and dig tunnels. That's what gophers do. They are a lot bigger than us moles, but they're smaller than you because you... you look like you're a person, Kitty, even though you're dressed like a cat. Is that true? Are you a person?'
Yeah, yeah, I'm a person superhero because I have my cat costume on.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Well, why... why are you dressed like a cat? Why do you have a cat costume?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Because... because I want to look like a cat superhero.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And then all of a sudden they heard a dig-dig-dig-dig-dig-dig-dig and out popped a furry head.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Hi... Kitty, that's a gopher.
Um, 'Hello everyone, what are you doing in our tunnel?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: We're just coming to visit you again.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, thanks.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And here's a special superhero person guest who's a special one because she saves people, who's a superhero.
'Wow,' said the gopher.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And her name is Kitty, and she's dressed like a cat superhero right now.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: 'Wow, I thought for a second you were a cat,' says the gopher, 'but you must be a person because you're really big.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, I'm a person cat superhero.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what super things can you do since you're a superhero?
I can save people and rescue things and I'm also available to talk to cats and I brought my cat troop, but Pumpkin's hiding in between my legs.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, Pumpkin, are you scared?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah, I'm scared.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: What are you scared of, Pumpkin?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I'm scared of you because you're really big and in the... remember that I saw you once and I hid under Kitty's legs.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the gopher said, 'Well, I'm just a gopher. My name's Goober. I'm not even a grown-up gopher, I'm just a kiddo gopher. And I like to play games and nibble on broccoli and dig really deep holes. Do you like to do any of those things?'
Um... no, I just eat kibble and walk around and get pets.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Pets? What are those?
Those are pets from head to tail. Izzy will show you.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And sometimes when I get pets I purr like this... [purring sound]. This is how I get a pet. This is how Pumpkin gets pets, said Kitty.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Goober the gopher said, 'Wow, I never knew about any of that stuff. But what do you do as a superhero? Who's somebody that you've saved or something you've rescued recently?'
Uh, I rescued the golden tiger treasure just from your house a minute ago.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: The golden tiger... Oh, you mean our... our little golden tiger statue that we had decorating our... our mudroom.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah, yeah. I took it back to the museum with Pumpkin and Figaro, Katsumi, and Pixie, and Pumpkin.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see. Well, if it belonged to the museum, I'm glad you rescued it and brought it back there. Well, it's about time for me to go to bed, said Goober the gopher.
Oh, well...
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: So I'll have to say goodbye.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Okay, but Kitty said 'I'm afraid you could talk to me in the morning because I'll be visiting you in the mornings on only Sundays.'
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh,' said Goober. 'Okay, I'm looking forward to visiting with you. You're welcome anytime, and you could even come over for breakfast if you want.'
Yeah, and tomorrow I'm going to the diner for breakfast, and tomorrow I'll tell you all about it with my cat troop.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: That sounds wonderful, said Goober. Time for me to go into my... um, bedroom tunnel. Goodnight everyone. And that's the end of our story.

characters.name: Kitty
characters.description: Isabella’s loyal companion and a valiant superhero, this feline-costumed commander harnesses agile, cat-like powers to lead an intrepid crew through the drifting wonders of Balloon World. Bound by a mission of guardianship, she navigates the whimsical floating realm on daring adventures, rescuing lost treasures and protecting every creature she encounters.

characters.name: Uncle Grisco
characters.description: A nomadic mole scientist and science teacher, this subterranean inventor resides in a home brimming with wondrous experiments, serving as a devoted confidant to the gopher folk. Within his laboratory of glowing elixirs and prismatic shadows, he fuses volcanic lore with the study of light to translate the planet's restless movements and the scarred history of cosmic craters. A wandering sage who maps both deep tectonic veins and celestial paths, he frequently emerges from his sprawling tunnels to share ancient botanical secrets and astronomical insights with his friend Seeker.

characters.name: Goober
characters.description: A young kiddo gopher who likes playing games and eating broccoli.

characters.name: Pumpkin
characters.description: A student of Ginger Catasorry and veteran of Kitty the Superhero’s specialized troop, this feline translates the tactical intuition of dark gopher tunnels into rigorous academic study. Despite their combat experience, they harbor a paralyzing fear of being eaten by their subterranean foes—initially trembling at the mere sight of the big gopher—a dread that frequently sends the scholar scurrying to hide between Izzy’s legs for sanctuary.

characters.name: Figaro
characters.description: A sharp-witted scholar of the Ginger Catasorry, this feline hero balances rigorous academic discipline with the street-wise loyalty of Kitty’s superhero troop. Driven by a restless spirit, they are the first to slip into the night in search of adventure, prowling for action while the rest of the crew sleeps.

characters.name: Katsumi
characters.description: A distinguished scholar of the Ginger Catasorry and elite member of the academy’s talking cat crew, this feline has emerged from a long dormancy to join Kitty’s cat troop. Balancing studious discipline with silver-tongued eloquence, they bring the full weight of their feline intellect and the rare gift of speech to the unfolding journey.

characters.name: Pixie
characters.description: A nimble operative in Kitty’s elite superhero squad, this scholarly feline balances tactical missions and Ginger Catasorry studies with a profound appreciation for restorative slumber. Currently navigating a perilous underground expedition, the talking adventurer greets each waking moment with a signature "Hello, hello," shifting seamlessly from a quiet nap to the sharp-eyed focus required for subterranean survival.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

places.name: The Gopher Tunnel
places.description: A sprawling labyrinth of cool, earthen tunnels serves as the shadowed sanctuary for a hospitable gopher family. This subterranean network acts as a clandestine meeting ground, where Kitty and Uncle Grisco navigate the dark to consult with their burrowing allies.

places.name: The Mudroom
places.description: A room in the gopher's house where the golden tiger statue was kept.

places.name: The Museum
places.description: The rightful home of the golden tiger treasure where Kitty returned the statue.

places.name: The Diner
places.description: A bustling communal hub on Sesame Street where Kitty and her cat troop converge with neighborhood friends for a sprawling breakfast feast, filling the morning air with the warmth of shared stories and a spirit of togetherness.

places.name: Goober's Bedroom Tunnel
places.description: The specific tunnel where the gopher goes to sleep at night.
